---
title: "test_sv_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_sv_engine_empire.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.82
style_score: 3.39
intel_score: 2.51
overall_score: 4.15
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)

### Exports
- `TestSovereignEngineEmpire`
- `test_init`
- `test_proactive_lexicon_lift`
